# TaxOps Suite

> Professional offshore tax compliance and client communication suite for CPA firms — manage firms, projects, tasks, time, petty cash, HR, and reports in one operations hub.

TaxOps Suite is a private operations platform for offshore accounting and tax teams. Most pages are gated behind authentication; the public surface is the marketing landing, sign-in, and the user guide.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point.
- [Sign in](/login): Authentication for firm staff and client users.
- [User guide](/guide/manual): Walkthrough of dashboard, firms, projects, tasks, time logs, reports, and admin.
- [FAQ](/guide/faq): Common questions about filters, roles, exports, and access.
- [Workflows](/guide/workflows): Step-by-step playbooks for common operations.

## Optional

- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Account recovery.
